Full primary stack coverage: TypeScript/Node.js and React in production at Optilyz and RIDE, plus Java/Kotlin-adjacent JVM work at Altom and polyglot fluency across Python-adjacent ecosystems

Deep craftsmanship foundation — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE, Docker/Kubernetes deployment experience, MongoDB/SQL databases, and a track record of teaching testing (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, Fluent-Asserts library)

response.justification: Aisha is a seasoned full-stack engineer whose 15+ year trajectory comfortably clears the 6-year bar, with current Staff-level work at re:cinq squarely on the primary TypeScript/Node.js stack and — crucially — direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, a rare and high-value match for the required AI agent skill. Production React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes, and Java exposure cover the rest of the stack, while a strong craftsmanship signal (TDD, trunk-based development, authored test runner, public workshops) suggests the kind of reliable, well-tested delivery this role calls for.
